sms.name: Bill Generated
sms.message: Dear {CustomerName}, your bill for {Month} is {Amount} BDT. Due date: {DueDate}. Customer ID: {CustomerID}.

sms.name: Due Reminder
sms.message: Dear {CustomerName}, your bill of {Amount} BDT for {Month} is due. Please pay before {DueDate}.

sms.name: Payment Confirmation
sms.message: Dear {CustomerName}, we received your payment of {Amount} BDT on {PaymentDate}. Thank you!

sms.name: Account Suspension
sms.message: Dear {CustomerName}, your internet service has been suspended due to overdue payment. Please pay your bill to restore service. Customer ID: {CustomerID}.

sms.name: Customer Registration
sms.message: Dear {CustomerName}, welcome to Smart ISP! Your Customer ID: {CustomerID}. PPPoE Username: {PPPoEUsername}, Password: {PPPoEPassword}.

sms.name: Bill Reminder
sms.message: Reminder: Your internet bill of {Amount} BDT is due tomorrow ({DueDate}). Please pay to avoid service suspension.

sms.name: Service Restored
sms.message: Dear {CustomerName}, your internet service has been restored. Thank you for your payment!

sms.name: Package Upgrade
sms.message: Dear {CustomerName}, your internet package has been upgraded. Enjoy faster speed!

ধন্যবাদ,
{CompanyName} টিম
